message:
test(fcp-core): pin ForkResolution validity truth table + ForkResolutionOutcome shape + resolve_by_lease ordering (flywheel_connectors-w4b4c)

Bead asks for PolicyConflictResolution variant Display + serde tag pinning.
No type literally named PolicyConflictResolution exists in fcp-core; the
closest "conflict resolution" analogue is ForkResolution at
connector_state.rs:1807 — a 3-variant strategy enum that resolves fork
conflicts (competing writes). Existing recovery_strategy_variant_matrix.rs
covers Display + JSON tag stability + CBOR tag bytes + noncanonical
rejection; this pin adds orthogonal invariants.

Coverage: ForkResolution::is_valid_for(model) full truth table —
ChooseByLease only valid for SingletonWriter, CrdtMerge only for any
Crdt variant (walked across LwwMap/OrSet/GCounter/PnCounter),
ManualResolution universally valid (the safety-fallback contract),
disjoint-validity sentinel (ChooseByLease and CrdtMerge can never both
be valid for the same model). ForkResolutionOutcome 7-field JSON shape,
embedded strategy snake_case round-trip for every variant, CBOR
round-trip. StateForkDetectionResult externally-tagged enum: NoFork
{head, seq} + ForkDetected(ForkEvent) tuple variant + CBOR
Value-inspection on the single-key outer map. ForkEvent::resolve_by_lease
ordered truth table (a > b → branch_a, a < b → branch_b, a == b → None
escalation, u64 boundaries). ForkEvent JSON + CBOR round-trip.

12 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-w4b4c cargo test -p
fcp-core --test policy_conflict_resolution_variant_display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
